title: senecio sylvestris
intro: Senecio sylvestris, also known as wood germander, is a perennial plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and reducing inflammation and pain. Wood germander is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture or decoction form, although its use should be cautioned due to potential toxicity.
